history.content: create a gui app that generate random numbers from 1 to 1000

The GUI application has been successfully created and saved as random_number_generator_gui.py.

To run the application, please execute the following command in your terminal:
python random_number_generator_gui.py

The application will open a window allowing you to click the "Generate Random Number" button to get a random number between 1 and 1000.
